---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a focused improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user problem would this solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the simplest version that would be useful.

## Scope check

- [ ] This keeps LocalDocs AI local-first.
- [ ] This remains useful without requiring an OpenAI API key.
- [ ] This does not require accounts, cloud sync, authentication, or a complex database.
- [ ] This fits the current roadmap or explains why the roadmap should change.

## Alternatives considered

What simpler alternatives did you consider?
